hypothesis: Silicon–X alloys that keep the largest continuous Li+ diffusion channel radius nearly constant across the full lithiation–delithiation range (ΔRt ≤ 0.25 Å) will exhibit substantially improved cycle life in practical full-cell configurations, retaining ≥60% of their initial capacity after 500 cycles at 1C, compared with high-capacity Si–X alloys having larger channel-size variation (ΔRt > 0.25 Å).
